instruction: Reply to Miguel Santos at Pine Ridge Fabrication about the forklift traffic safety walkthrough. Tell him I can come by Thursday morning, ask him to send the current incident log and the latest floor map first, and let him know I'll use the lockout/tagout checklist as a starting point.

rule_ref.rule_text: When he asks for help sending a message about applications, safety work, or outreach, he prefers it drafted for review instead of being sent immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: I like job, safety, and mentorship messages drafted first so I can review the wording before anything goes out.

attributes.subject: Forklift traffic safety walkthrough
attributes.body: Hi John, we're updating the pedestrian barriers around the forklift lanes at Pine Ridge Fabrication and would like your help with a safety walkthrough before we make changes. Are you available to stop by this week? Let me know what records or site documents you want us to send ahead of time.

attributes.subject: Valve inventory count
attributes.body: Can you check whether the revised valve count made it into the maintenance spreadsheet before the team call this afternoon?

attributes.subject: August service invoice available
attributes.body: Your monthly FieldTrack Pro invoice is ready in the billing portal.
